strengths: Meets the minimum requirement of over 15 years of software engineering experience across varied technical stacks.
Demonstrates the preferred entrepreneurial experience as the Founder of GISCollective, building an open-source data platform.
Shows recent hands-on builder experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators.
concerns: Lacks Director-level individual contributor experience, having primarily operated at the Senior and Staff developer levels.
AI experience appears limited to very recent, tactical tooling, falling short of the preferred 'recognized expertise' and advanced AI degrees.
Shows no evidence of advising strategic enterprise customers or partners on cutting-edge cloud and AI adoption.
response.justification: While Bogdan meets the baseline 15-year engineering requirement and possesses strong hands-on software craftsmanship, he is a fundamentally weak fit for a Principal Engineer in AI Strategy. His career consists almost entirely of tactical Senior and Staff developer roles, lacking the Director-level strategic oversight and enterprise customer advisory experience required to shape cloud product futures. Furthermore, his exposure to artificial intelligence is limited to very recent infrastructure work, entirely missing the deep, recognized AI expertise and advanced academic foundation necessary to drive disruptive AI platform strategies.
